Authorized access Talk to a specialist

Eagle Group

Engineering, logistics and foreign trade in coordination.

Specialized projects require more than technology selection. They also need storage, preparation, traceability, customs clearance and document coordination.

Conceptual architecture
01

Technology engineering and integration

Eagle Commercial S.A.

Connects operational needs, solution design, supplier engagement, implementation, training and support.

02

Specialized logistics and storage

Eagle’s Logistics Services S.A.S.

Supports storage, inventory, preparation, packaging and logistics coordination from the free trade zone.

03

Customs and foreign trade management

Eagle Trade Agencia de Aduanas S.A.S. Nivel II

Supports customs and foreign trade processes within the applicable regulatory framework.

Flow

A connected chain that reduces friction.

  1. 01

    Technical and commercial structuring

  2. 02

    Supplier coordination

  3. 03

    Logistics and storage

  4. 04

    Applicable customs processes

  5. 05

    Delivery, implementation and support

Corporate governance

Each service retains its own scope and responsibility.

Legal names, authorizations and service conditions must be validated before publication. Contracting and execution follow the relevant entity and scope.

Eagle Commercial

Start with the right point of contact.

Eagle Commercial will guide the request to the appropriate technical, logistics or customs component.

Talk to a specialist info@eaglecommercial.com.co

Technology engineering and integration for organizations operating in critical environments.

info@eaglecommercial.com.co
